name: Welding Robot IK Trajectory Validation
description: As a robot programming engineer, develop and validate a welding robot trajectory for an automotive chassis application in CoppeliaSim. The trajectory must follow a linear weld seam path of at least 0.2 m using inverse kinematics and at least 8 waypoints, ensuring the end-effector accurately tracks each waypoint. Export the per-waypoint records (including achieved positions) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/weld_trajectory.csv and the trajectory summary statistics to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/weld_stats.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
